violations.text: Raw animal foods (shelled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (dressings) in the reach-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/04/2025

The facility is lacking test strips to measure: 1) The concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the dishwasher. 2) The concentration of the Quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. Per interview with PIC, test strips have been ordered. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/04/2025

Raw animal foods (shelled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (dressings) in the prep unit. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. PIC called for service at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025

Ranch, blue cheese, tartar sauce and sour cream was observed held at 61-67 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025
Prep unit (dressings) located in the kitchen area was not in good repair, ambient observed at 67F. PIC took unit out of service at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025

The facility is lacking test strips to measure: 1) The concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the dishwasher. 2) The concentration of the Quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025
The hoods in the kitchen area has an accumulation of grease and soil residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/04/2025
